Would you like to download
Naruto media from dbgt?
 



 
Layout Revision: 02/04/2004
Website Founded: 1997
Webmaster: Jamjar
 

Changing Servers
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Wednesday 2nd June, 2004 at 23:16 GMT
  
Hey, over the last week or so you have probably noticed alot of down-time, it is because our current web-host is not able to facilitate our increasingly demanding website. You will be happy to know; on saturday we will be moving to a dedicated web-servers; where our website can once again thrive.

Untill we change web-servers, our host as requested that we do not have any of the downloads up. It should be about a week or so, untill everything is back up.

Thank You,
Jamjar
IMPORTNANT- NO MULTIPLE CONNECTIONS ALLOWED
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Wednesday 2nd June, 2004 at 11:37 GMT
  
HEY, I'VE BEEN GETTING MANY COMPLAINTS ABOUT DOWNLOADS NOT WORKING; THIS IS BECAUSE PEOPLE OPEN UP MULTIPLE CONNECTIONS TO DOWNLOADS USING DOWNLOAD MANAGERS; CAUSING THE SERVER TO BECOME EXTREMELY SLOW AND EVENTUALLY CRASH.

WE REQUEST THAT YOU DO NOT DOWNLOAD MORE THAN ONE FILE USING DOWNLOAD MANAGERS, AS IT WILL CAUSE THE SERVER TO CONTINUALLY BE DOWN - NOBODY THEN WILL BE ABLE TO DOWNLOAD ANYTHING.
SERVER WORKING
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Tuesday 1st June, 2004 at 00:18 GMT
  
Hey, Finally the server is back up and running as normal - Happy Downloading :)
Few More Movies + Server Status
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 29th May, 2004 at 17:57 GMT
  
Hey, I've added a few more movies to the site; Naruto Jump Festa 2004, The DBGT Movie, and Dbz Movies 10-13. Unfortunately the dbz movies aren't that quality as they are japanese releases ripped from videos, however they do have english subtitles. Bad News: The server is still being a bitch, and I'm not sure when our host is going to sort it out; the site is going to be very slow for the next few days, sorry.
Server Problems
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Thursday 27th May, 2004 at 21:48 GMT
  
Hey, on wednesday our host experienced a DoS (Denial of Service) attack causing all their servers to almost crash. They should have sorted it out by the end of today, however the website may still remain slow for the next two or three days because our host will be carrying out routine security checks. Just letting you know, I'll post again when everything is fully operational.
Appleseed Review
 

Posted By: Dante
Date: Tuesday 25th May, 2004 at 00:00 GMT
  
Well with final exams starting for me tomorrow I decided I could write up a review before I hit the books again to study for exams. I did the review on a classic manga called "Appleseed" which was made into a anime. So for now I hope you enjoy the review and good luck to every student in school or college with there upcoming final exams when it comes to your time of doing them.
Anime Movies Section
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Monday 24th May, 2004 at 19:04 GMT
  
Hey, i've spent the last few days uploading and orgonising the anime movies section. Unfortunately it's the last big thing I can add before I start some important exams. I'll try and get the other staff to update as much as possible, but I cant promise anything, ahem! (LAZY). When I finish my exams on the 26th June I'll be sure to add lots of media to compensate. Like the dragonballz movies you will have to be a member to download the anime movies. There are currently 10 movies up, however I intend to release quite a few more after my exams are over.

*Anime Movies Section
COMPETITION WINNERS
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Sunday 23rd May, 2004 at 11:21 GMT
  
Hey, I finally got round to looking at the competition entries last night, there were over 90, however I managed reach a decision on the top 5. The top two contestants: Sean Coady (1st Place) and Alan Chen (2nd Place) will recieve our top prizes of 1 years free hosting and a set of dragonball collectable figurines. Keep a look out for the DBGT.com Prize draw which we will be releasing details on soon.

Winner's List
1st Place - Sean Coady - Digtial Art
2nd Place - Alan Chen - Sketch
3rd Place - James B - Digital Art
4th Place - Shakeel Zahid - Sketch
5th Place - Jason Lam - Web Page Banner
Competition Close Date
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Thursday 20th May, 2004 at 17:32 GMT
  
Just a little reminder; the DBGT.com and HostXL anime fanart competition is coming to an end. The close date for the competition is tomorrow (the 21st May), then later on saturday, the competition winners will be announced. Be sure to have e-mailed all your entries to jamjarface@hotmail.com by midnight on friday. The link to the competition page is below.

*Competition Details
Member Section & Dragonball Z Movies
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Sunday 16th May, 2004 at 13:21 GMT
  
Hey, I've spent all of this week coding dbgt.com's new members section and uploading the first of the full media files. You can now download Dragonballz movies 1-9, the trunks, and the bardock specials. The movies are in real format; you can download the real player from real.com if you don't already have it. You have to register to download the movies, but trust me; its worth it because we will be adding alot of new full media from a range of different animes in the weeks to come.

*Get Registered
Two new ROMs up
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Wednesday 12th May, 2004 at 21:57 GMT
  
Hey, I've added two new gameboy advance roms to the games section; Legacy of Goku 2 and DragonballZ Taiketsu. I'll try my best to add new content to the website over the next few weeks, however it's going to be hard as I have some important exams coming up. Cya for now.
Anime Section Finally Open
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 8th May, 2004 at 14:32 GMT
  
Hey everyone, the long wait is finally over; dbgt.com's anime section is now open. There is an anime reviews section (credit to: spike and dante), an anime cel gallery with over 3000 animation cels, and an anime topsite where you can list your website to increase traffic. All of us here at dbgt.com really hope you like it.
